title: Richella glauca
taxonomy: Richella glauca is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to tropical Asia. Richella glauca is an evergreen tree with glaucous leaves. The plant is classified within the genus Richella, which is part of the Annonaceae family. Further classification involves its order (Magnoliales) and division (Angiosperms).
